[METADATA/INTRO]: I was honored to be one of three featured guest speakers at this year’s Louisiana’s Commemoration of Bernardo de Galvez and the Battle of Baton Rouge held at the Hilton Baton Rouge Capitol Center on Sept 17, 2024. It was...

This was a beautiful experience at the 2024 Louisiana Commemoration of Bernardo de Galvez and the Battle of Baton Rouge. Congratulations to all who made this event successful. Viva Galvez

[PUBLISHED DATE]: April 26th 2019
[TITLE]: Monthly Meeting 2018/2019 April 2019 - thetokyowomensclub ページ！
[METADATA/INTRO]: Date: April 26th 2019 (Fri) Time: 12:00-14:00...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: After the show, Mme. Olivia Batjobo (Burkina Faso) also joined us. 
 We enjoyed talking with the ladies of AWAAJ, having African buffet lunch. 
 A picture painted by Mme. Maria de Fatima Xavier was up for auction, and ethnic cloths, accessories, and bowls were available at a charity bazaar. Lastly, we danced, danced, and danced. It was an exciting afternoon. 
 There were 78 attendees from TWC and 13 from AWAAJ.
